race.description: Sportsbet 2026 Battle Of The Bush Barcaldine Qualifier Hcp
race.comment: HURRICANE THUNDER (8) fought on for third last start over 1200m at Cloncurry, making it two minor placings in a row. Should settle just off the speed despite the draw. Likely improver with strong prospects. ENTREPRENEURIAL (6) ran below expectations last time at Nanango, finishing 11th starting at $4.60. Has started two times at this course and distance and is yet to miss the placings. Anticipating a better run this time. FINE SHOT (7) finished third last start over 1200m at Bowen when he made late ground, beaten 1.75 lengths. Will benefit from that outing. Look for another forward showing. SHE SMASHES (11) deserves respect having made it four straight wins with her fresh success.
